event: A fallen demon lying defeated among desolate mountains
symbols: fallen figure among rocks — the ruin and desolation of rebellion against God
broken iridescent wings — former angelic beauty now shattered by pride
barren mountain landscape — spiritual wasteland of exile from divine presence
twilight hues — the liminal state between light and utter darkness
description: A wide, panoramic composition showing a large humanoid figure with an elongated body lying prostrate among dark, jagged rocks and crags in a desolate mountainous landscape. The figure has iridescent, peacock-like broken wings spread behind it and muscular, pale limbs twisted in anguish. The face is turned with an expression of torment and defiance. Surrounding the figure are strange, flower-like or crystalline formations in muted blue-green and gold tones. Snow-capped mountains rise in the background under a cold twilight sky of blue and violet.
